inputs.label: Body Weight
inputs.businessContext: User body weight in kilograms, used to calculate energy expenditure based on MET

inputs.label: MET Value
inputs.businessContext: Metabolic Equivalent of Task, where 1 MET = 3.5 ml O₂/kg/min, representing resting metabolic rate

inputs.label: Activity Duration
inputs.businessContext: Duration of the non-exercise activity in hours, e.g., walking, standing, or light occupational tasks
